subtasks.description: Check user's current IAM role and permissions from the IAM system
Fetch manager approval status and request details from the workflow system
Update IAM permissions based on manager approval and role requirements
Send confirmation email to user and manager with updated IAM role and permissions details

plan.cost_rationale: Four sequential subtasks, all assigned to multitool_plan since the query explicitly requests a multi-step provisioning workflow involving multiple enterprise tools (IAM system, workflow system for approvals, email service). Each step is independent in terms of specialist capability but depends on previous outcomes. All assigned to 'small' tier because each step is a straightforward tool invocation: read current state, fetch approval, update records, and send notification. No complex reconciliation, data transformation, or policy reasoning is required—this is orchestration of standard provisioning operations.

arguments.message: Workflow Status Summary - User: current_user | Approvals Found: $2.results | Request Details: $3.results

arguments.subject: IAM Access Provisioning Confirmed
arguments.body: Your access provisioning request has been approved and your IAM permissions have been updated. New role: $5.results[0].required_role. If you have questions, contact your administrator.

arguments.message: IAM Access Provisioning Complete - User: current_user | Role Granted: $5.results[0].required_role | Approval Confirmed | Notification Sent
